mode.description: extract: only extract IOCs from report. correlate: match IOCs against PCAP. full: both stages.

report_text.description: The threat report or Markdown content to extract IOCs from.

report_file.description: Path to a file containing the threat report.

iocs.description: Pre-extracted IOCs to correlate directly (skip extraction stage).

use_ai_extraction.description: Use LLM-enhanced IOC extraction (requires LLM connection).
